Metadata.Goal: Unify CLI/TUI/headless runtime composition through profile, capability registry, and runtime binding.
Metadata.Description: 建立 runtime profile/capability/runtime binding 边界，使 product surface 只选择 profile，不手工拼默认 AI 业务语义。

TaskGroup.name: Profile And Binding Contract
TaskGroup.Description: 定义 profile/capability/runtime binding descriptor contract。

Task.name: Add failing binding descriptor tests
Task.Description: 新增 CLI/TUI/headless binding descriptor 一致性失败测试。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试能表达同 profile 下三入口 descriptor 兼容。

Task.name: Define runtime profile and capability contracts
Task.Description: 定义 runtime profile、capability registry、runtime binding descriptor 类型。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: contracts 覆盖 profile id、capabilities、storage flags、entry type、modules、overlays、surface capabilities。

TaskGroup.name: Shared Composition Path
TaskGroup.Description: 收敛 CLI/TUI/headless 入口组合路径。

Task.name: Implement shared runtime binding builder
Task.Description: 实现共享 binding builder，入口只选择 profile 并提供 surface adapter。

Task.name: Route terminal entries through shared composition
Task.Description: 将 terminal entry 的 runtime 创建接入共享 composition path。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: entry 不再私有拼 provider/tool/conversation 默认语义。

TaskGroup.name: Storage Capabilities And Surface Boundary
TaskGroup.Description: 将 logs/files 与 upgrade 等能力显式化，并验证 surface 不写 domain truth。

Task.name: Add storage capability flags to profile binding
Task.Description: 把 logs/files 能力纳入 profile binding descriptor，并覆盖 memory-only 行为。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 关闭 logs/files 时普通对话不依赖 session 文件写入。

Task.name: Add surface no-domain-write conformance tests
Task.Description: 验证 TUI/CLI/headless 不直接写 domain truth。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: surface 不直接创建 provider/tool/conversation/history owner。
